_comment: OTel Demo chaos-mesh-dependent scenarios — the 4 network families (latency/packet-loss/partition/dns) + the L4 compound. Deferred from v1 until chaos-mesh was confirmed working; authored + smoke-validated on the GCP VM 2026-06-09 (chaos-mesh 2.8.2). The L4 compound uses the 2026-06-09 ChaosMeshChaos extension to Invoke-MultiFaultOrchestration.ps1.
